things.name: Old Vine (Stara Trta)
things.description: The world's oldest vine, over 450 years old, still producing wine on the Lent waterfront; Maribor gives a bottle of its wine to heads of state as an official gift

things.name: Maribor Castle
things.description: 15th-century castle in the old town housing the Regional Museum with collections on the history, art and culture of the Styria region of Slovenia

things.name: Lent (Old Waterfront District)
things.description: Maribor's medieval waterfront of wine cellars, galleries and restaurants along the Drava river; venue of the famous Lent International Summer Festival

things.name: Maribor Cathedral
things.description: Gothic cathedral from the 13th century with a Romanesque baptistery, notable sculptures and the nearby plague column in the main square

things.name: Pohorje Mountain Resort
things.description: Forested mountain massif above Maribor with skiing in winter and hiking, cycling and spa resorts in summer; accessible by cable car from the city

things.name: Main Square (Glavni Trg)
things.description: Maribor's grand central square with the 18th-century Plague Column, the Baroque Town Hall and surrounding coffee houses in the pedestrianised heart

things.name: Aquapark Terme Maribor
things.description: Thermal spa and waterpark complex with indoor and outdoor pools, water slides and wellness facilities popular with visitors from across the region

things.name: Jewish Tower (Judentum)
things.description: 14th-century tower from the medieval city walls adjoining Maribor's Jewish quarter; the oldest preserved Jewish settlement in Slovenia

things.name: Dravograd Gorge
things.description: Scenic gorge carved by the Drava river upstream from Maribor; a nature corridor popular for kayaking, cycling the Drava cycling route and forest walking

things.name: Ljudski Vrt Stadium
things.description: Home of NK Maribor, Slovenia's most successful club; reached the Champions League group stage in 2011-12 and 2014-15 and are serial Slovenian champions
